name: LBMA Gold Price PM Fix (USD/oz)
notes: LBMA daily PM auction fix in USD via prices.lbma.org.uk/json/gold_pm.json. Replaces FRED's discontinued GOLDPMGBD228NLBM (LBMA changed methodology in 2017) and supersedes the brief Nasdaq Data Link routing (LBMA/GOLD moved to NDL paid tier). Wired §3.9 2026-05-09 — driven by regime AA Phase 0c long-run gold requirement.
